# Plan: Nocturne Versions of Three Light-Mode Screens

## Context
Three Sonata (light) screens need matching Nocturne (dark) counterparts:
- `jw5PO` — "Option A — Document-First — Sonata (Light)" (1440×900)
- `udYlY` — "Tactile Sandbox — Sonata" (1440×900)
- `DDQQm` — "Export Modal — Sonata (Light)" (1440×900)

Existing Nocturne pattern established by `imvwy` (Option A dark) and `SPsld` (Option B dark). All three new screens must preserve every layout, component, and content element — only colors/tokens change.

---

## Token Substitution Map

| Sonata token | Nocturne equivalent |
|---|---|
| `$sonata-bg` | `$nocturne-bg` |
| `$sonata-surface` | `$nocturne-surface` |
| `$sonata-surface/10` | `$nocturne-surface/20` |
| `$sonata-surface/20` | `$nocturne-surface/20` |
| `$sonata-surface/40` | `$nocturne-surface/40` |
| `$sonata-surface/70` | `$nocturne-surface/70` |
| `$sonata-detail` | `$nocturne-surface/40` |
| `$sonata-accent` | `$nocturne-accent` |
| `$text-on-light` | `$text-on-dark` |
| `$neutral-50` (panel bg) | `$nocturne-detail` |
| `$neutral-200` | `$nocturne-detail` |
| `$neutral-700` (score lines, barlines) | `$nocturne-surface/60` |

**Manual overrides after bulk swap:**
- Score Canvas `fill:#FFFFFF` (jw5PO/udYlY) → `#1A1110` (as per imvwy pattern)
- Export Modal paper texture `#F8F3EA` → `#1A1110`
- ThemeToggle: swap active side — Sun inactive, Moon active (filled with `$nocturne-accent`)

| Sonata token | Nocturne equivalent |

- Ordering matters: `#2D1817` (text-on-light hex) must be replaced BEFORE `#F5F0EF` (neutral-50) → `#2D1817` to avoid chaining
- Paper texture gradient colors NOT replaced by the tool (gradient stops are not matched)
